name: Turkey Tetrazinni
recipeIngredient: 1 package 12 oz PACKAGE FROZEN EGG NOODLES
1 can 10 3/4 oz CREAM OF MUSHROOM SOUP
1 1/2 cups MIXED FROZEN PEAS AND CARROTS, THAWED
2 teaspoons SNIPPED FRESH PARSLEY (or 1 1/2 teaspoons DRIED)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles, uncovered, in boiling water for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Drain the noodles.
3. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine soup, milk, water, and cheddar cheese. Cook and stir over medium heat until the cheese melts and the sauce is hot.
4. Stir in cooked noodles, turkey, peas, carrots, and pimiento.
5. Spoon the mixture into a greased 11 3/4 inches x 7 1/2 inches baking dish.
6. Combine crumbs, parmesan cheese, and parsley.
7. Sprinkle over the top of the baking dish.
8. Bake, uncovered, in a 375 degree oven for 30 minutes or until hot.
